overall.description: A static camera view of a gothic-style circular classroom or common room with stone walls and tall arched windows, likely from a fantasy video game. Characters walk through the space at different times while the camera remains fixed, capturing the medieval interior with magical artifacts and furniture arranged around a central patterned rug.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a static view of a gothic circular classroom with stone walls and tall windows draped in purple velvet. Natural light filters through the windows, illuminating the central patterned rug and various crystal balls on pedestals. A stationary figure stands near the left wall while a woman in a cream dress enters from the left at 20 seconds and walks across the room, passing the central rug and various wooden desks arranged around the perimeter.

segments.scene_description: The room remains static and empty for the first 15 seconds of this segment, maintaining the same gothic atmosphere with crystal balls and bookshelves visible. At 50 seconds, a small character in dark robes enters from the bottom center and walks across the circular rug toward the left side, passing near the stationary figure by the wall. The lighting remains consistent with natural daylight streaming through the tall arched windows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static perspective of a gothic circular classroom as different figures pass through its sunlit, mystical interior. It begins with a view of stone walls and tall windows draped in purple velvet, where natural light illuminates crystal balls on pedestals and a central patterned rug. As a woman in a cream dress enters from the left, she traverses the room and passes the wooden desks arranged around the perimeter. The scene then settles into a period of stillness, preserving the quiet atmosphere of the bookshelves and artifacts before a small character in dark robes emerges from the bottom center. This figure walks across the circular rug toward the left, passing the stationary figure by the wall under the consistent glow of daylight streaming through the arched windows.
